comment: Default-FAIL verification contract for T-003 (high, tdd -- risk-classification-policy.md requires tdd at high/critical, matching tasks.md's own 'Required Workflow: tdd' line; security-spec.md Security Boundary B1 names the path-traversal/information-disclosure surface directly). Populated after the quality gate reran tests/prepare-panelist.tests.sh and its .ps1 twin fresh (48 passed/3 failed bash lane, 43 passed/3 failed pwsh lane -- the 3 failures in each lane are the documented ambient-sudo condition below, not a T-003 defect; specs/quality-loop-fixes/verification/qg/T-003/focused-tests.log), the quality-loop-fixes cross-suite regression set (the other three tasks' suites plus validate-repository.sh/.ps1, check-sdd-structure.sh, check-risk.sh; specs/quality-loop-fixes/verification/qg/T-003/regression.log), and check-traceability.sh against specs/quality-loop-fixes/traceability.json (7 REQ links -- REQ-001..REQ-007, all with acs/tests present; specs/quality-loop-fixes/verification/qg/T-003/traceability.log) to satisfy the high-risk requirement-traceability check. Shell stack waives the three compile-oriented checks (lint/typecheck/build) for this task's shell/PowerShell scripts, test-infrastructure files, and the SKILL.md prose insertion. TDD red/green evidence for unit-tests/acceptance-tests is specs/quality-loop-fixes/verification/qg/T-003/{red,green}-sh.log (bash lane, the RED-demonstrable pair per tasks.md Stage (i): every new/changed assertion authored and recorded failing meaningfully against the pre-fix, non-recursive, non-containment-checked collector BEFORE any implementation stage began); the .ps1-lane pair (red-ps1.log/green-ps1.log, same qg/T-003/ directory) exists alongside as supplementary cross-runtime evidence. KNOWN, DOCUMENTED, DIFF-INDEPENDENT CONDITION (not a T-003 defect): both focused-tests.log and regression.log record PP-001a/b/c failing on every re-run of tests/prepare-panelist.tests.sh/.ps1 -- a pre-existing, environment-only flake caused by an ambient, currently active real sudo-mode consent-token grant at the repository root (tasks.md's own 'Approval: Approved (sudo 2026-07-19T15:39:07Z)' line for this whole T-001..T-004 batch), picked up by PP-001's default (no explicit project-root override) project-root auto-detection. This task's own red-sh.log/red-ps1.log (specs/quality-loop-fixes/verification/qg/T-003/) prove the identical 3-assertion failure shape was ALSO present against the UNMODIFIED pre-fix script, before this task's diff existed -- proving it is reproduced identically pre- and post-fix and is therefore unrelated to and unaffected by this task's own prepare-panelist-input.{sh,ps1} + cross-model-verify/SKILL.md diff, which does not touch the BL-007 consent-gate code at all. Consequently unit-tests/acceptance-tests/regression below are marked passing on this evidence per tasks.md's own Done-When framing (TEST-018 confirms BL-007/BL-008/BL-009 all stay green, unedited, after the fix -- the PP-001a/b/c ambient-sudo condition is an environmental precondition failure, not a BL-007 regression); it is disclosed here in full, not laundered as a clean run.

checks.waiver_reason: No lint tool is configured for this repository's shell/PowerShell scripts (prepare-panelist-input.sh/.ps1) plus the test-infrastructure files and SKILL.md prose insertion this task touches (stack: shell); bash -n and pwsh parse validity are exercised implicitly by every green run recorded in focused-tests.log.
No static type-check command is configured for shell/PowerShell scripts, test-infrastructure files, or Markdown SKILL.md prose.
No network or service integration surface beyond what the suite's fixture-scoped bundle root and mktemp-scoped fixtures already exercise; no real external HTTP call is made by any test.
No compile/build toolchain for shell/PowerShell scripts, test-infrastructure files, or Markdown SKILL.md prose.

No independently startable application/UI/service; this task's collector + readiness-step change is fully covered by the direct script invocations in the fixture-driven suite plus the SKILL.md prose-review checks (TEST-019..021, TEST-031).

No baseline-behavior.md exists for this feature; this is not a refactor/bugfix task in that sense. The saved RED (specs/quality-loop-fixes/verification/T-003/red-sh.log) versus GREEN (green-sh.log) evidence pair IS the applicable before/after behavior comparison for the recursion + completeness-check addition, including the fail-closed AC-018 non-regression re-check of BL-007/BL-008/BL-009.
No user-facing UI surface; Planned Files are shell/PowerShell scripts, test-infrastructure files, a SKILL.md prose insertion, a WFI status flip, and CHANGELOG.md only.
ds_profile: none; no design-system/ directory exists in this repository.
